violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers have build-up and need cleaning. Clean fan covers in upright 2 door cooler in FOH prep area.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Forks on plate-ware service cart not inverted.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Carpeting installed in dry storage room. Wet mop equipment and liquids stored in room.--Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Unfinished wall construction in dry storage space.
General premises. — --Observed traffic of unauthorized person through food preparation, food storage or ware-washing area. East customer/delivery entryway passes through prep kitchen.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. FOH cabinets/shelving in disrepair.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. BOH food prep and ware washing area not provided with hand sink.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Restroom self closing devices not able to close doors.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Dry storage room has unfinished construction.
General premises. — --East entry door to parking area allows traffic of customers through food preparation, food storage & ware washing area.
